title: Red stakes, yellow stakes: penalty areas decoded
microFact: Yellow = drop behind, keeping the point of entry between you and the flag. Red = same, plus a sideways two-club-length drop.
lesson:
Water and marked wasteland are PENALTY AREAS, marked by stakes or painted lines. You can always try playing the ball as it lies inside one (no penalty, and you may now ground your club). Otherwise, take relief for ONE penalty stroke:

YELLOW penalty areas — two options:
1. Stroke and distance (replay from the original spot)
2. BACK-ON-A-LINE: drop anywhere on the line from the flag through the point where your ball last crossed the edge, going back as far as you like.

RED penalty areas — both yellow options PLUS:
3. LATERAL relief: drop within TWO club-lengths of where the ball crossed the edge, no nearer the hole.

That lateral option is why most areas today are marked red — it keeps play moving. The key skill: watch WHERE your ball last crossed the line. That crossing point, not where the ball sits, anchors all your relief options.

visual.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 320 200" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="system-ui,sans-serif">
<rect width="320" height="200" rx="10" fill="#e7f0e2"/>
<ellipse cx="160" cy="60" rx="95" ry="34" fill="#93c5fd" stroke="#1d4ed8" stroke-width="2"/>
<text x="160" y="64" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1d4ed8">penalty area</text>
<circle cx="160" cy="96" r="5" fill="#1c1917"/>
<text x="196" y="99" font-size="9" fill="#1c1917">crossing point X</text>
<circle cx="160" cy="20" r="3" fill="#b91c1c"/>
<line x1="160" y1="23" x2="160" y2="12" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="1.5"/>
<text x="171" y="18" font-size="9" fill="#b91c1c">flag</text>
<line x1="160" y1="96" x2="160" y2="180" stroke="#78716c" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/>
<circle cx="160" cy="156" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#78716c" stroke-width="2"/>
<text x="168" y="176" font-size="9" fill="#57534e">1&2: back-on-a-line (yellow + red)</text>
<line x1="160" y1="96" x2="228" y2="120" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="2"/>
<circle cx="228" cy="120" r="12" fill="none" stroke="#b91c1c" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="3 3"/>
<text x="244" y="124" font-size="9" fill="#b91c1c">3: lateral 2 club-lengths</text>
<text x="244" y="135" font-size="9" fill="#b91c1c" font-weight="700">RED only</text>
</svg>
visual.caption: Penalty-area relief: yellow gives two options, red adds the sideways drop.

quiz.question: Which relief option is ONLY available at red penalty areas?
options: Lateral drop within two club-lengths of the crossing point
A free drop at the nearest fairway
quiz.explanation: Lateral two-club-length relief is red's extra option. Yellow only offers stroke-and-distance or back-on-a-line.
